meta.description: A Claude AI skill — a named procedure Claude follows when invoked

name.description: Short kebab-case slug used to invoke the skill, e.g. review-pr

description.description: One or two sentence summary shown to the user and used by Claude to decide when to trigger the skill

triggerConditions.description: Phrases, patterns or contexts that should cause Claude to invoke this skill

skipConditions.description: Conditions where this skill should NOT be triggered despite apparent relevance

instructions.description: The full step-by-step procedure Claude follows when the skill is invoked

tools.description: MCP tools or Claude Code tools this skill relies on, e.g. mcp__kanecta__kanecta_get

outputFormat.description: Description of what the skill produces or returns to the user

relatedSkills.description: Names of other skills this one calls or is related to

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_35bc5f84_77f4_4064_9806_c101c40dbd92" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "trigger_conditions" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "skip_conditions" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "instructions" TEXT,
    "tools" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "output_format" TEXT,
    "related_skills" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "version" TEXT,
    "author" TEXT,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_35bc5f84_77f4_4064_9806_c101c40dbd92" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_35bc5f8477f44064_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
